# omada_networks (Data Source)

Lists all LAN networks on the Omada Controller for the configured site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "omada_networks" "all" {}

output "networks" {
  value = data.omada_networks.all.networks
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `networks` (Attributes List) List of networks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))

<a id="nestedatt--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Read-Only:

- `dhcp_enabled` (Boolean) Whether DHCP is enabled.
- `gateway_subnet` (String) The gateway IP and subnet in CIDR notation (e.g., '192.168.0.1/24').
- `id` (String) The network ID.
- `name` (String) The network name.
- `purpose` (String) The network purpose ('interface' or 'vlan').
- `vlan_id` (Number) The VLAN ID.
